description; DIABETIC SUPPLY for all diabetic supplies 

COMMENT: In the PDE file, this variable is populated by linking to the proprietary First DataBank MedKnowledge 
database by matching on the National Drug Code (NDC; variable in the PDE files called the product 
service identifier PROD_SRVC_ID). In the Formulary file, this variable is first available in 2010. It is 
populated by matching the drug products on the Part D Plan submitted formulary to FDB. Part D plan 
sponsors submit the
